---
title: "Harriet Godwin"
---

## Harriet Godwin

**Dates:** (Otterbourne 1861-1924)

### Description

pupil teacher at Otterbourne School, 1878

### Biography

She subsequently worked as a teacher in Melksham, Wiltshire, where she died unmarried in 1924.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 8 th 1878
- Letter from Sept 17th 1878
- Letter from June 17th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
